descriptionShort: Matt Hervey scores twice as Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 5-3 in Centennial Cup Western final.
descriptionLong: Matt Hervey scored two goals to lead the Richmond Sockeyes to a 5-3 victory over the Humboldt Broncos on Sunday night in Centennial Cup playoff action. The win gave Richmond a 3-2 series lead in the best-of-seven Western Canada final. Brian Kozak, Dave Tomlinson, and Dave Rutherford also scored for Richmond, while goalie Frank Romeo made 30 saves.
